case_title: RAUL VASQUEZ VS. PILAR TERAN RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY VASQUEZ, RAUL AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, PILAR TERAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, RAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, PILAR TERAN $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $73.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,873.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RONALD SIRES FILED BY VASQUEZ, RAUL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RONALD SIRES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT ACCEPTS PROOF OF SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, RAUL
